query:
-- Check the sasboss_services table for UCXcel and blank plan services
SELECT 
  ss.service_id, ss.enterprise_id, ss.enterprise_name, ss.service_ref_id,
  ss.product_name, ss.product_type, ss.monthly_recurring, ss.status
FROM sasboss_services ss
WHERE ss.product_name IN ('UCXcel Essential', 'UCXcel Webex Basic', '')
   OR ss.product_name IS NULL
ORDER BY ss.enterprise_name, ss.product_name
LIMIT 20;

  ss.product_name, ss.product_type, ss.monthly_recurring, ss.status
FROM sasboss_services ss
WHERE ss.product_name IN ('UCXcel Essential', 'UCXcel Webex Basic', '')
   OR ss.product_name IS NULL
ORDER BY ss.enterprise_name, ss.product_name
